_note: 51 entries total; 2 duplicate_of (1 Dougherty re-vote idx 3; 1 HP #89974 re-vote idx 47). 49 unique items. Scenario C applied: the $7,261,000 capital reserve withdrawal (Resolution 11.06, 2/29/24) was split — the $2,074,000 Pennetta HVAC slice is already tracked separately via Resolution 11.10 (has bid tab AF10659 attached), so only the remaining $5,187,000 Dougherty slice is kept in this entry (idx 2) to avoid double-counting the same Pennetta money. Of 49 unique items: 13 excluded from spending dollar total (1 rescission idx 4, 1 grant application idx 36, 1 policy threshold idx 46, 10 amendments absorbed within documented parent NTE). Result: 36 items / $14,477,997 genuine undocumented spending, 49 items / $18,533,640 raw.

summaries.summary: Annual authorization for staff travel expenses — conferences, training, and professional development

Boiler replacements at Liberty HS, PS#8, PS#16, PS#29, PS#41 — awarded to C. Dougherty & Co. via Resolution 10.03 on Nov 16, 2023 (outside dataset window, had bid tab AF10027 attached). Funded via capital reserve withdrawal Resolution 11.06 on Feb 29, 2024 — the withdrawal resolution itself has zero attachments on BoardDocs. Stored in the dataset as $5,187,000 (the Dougherty slice) after removing the $2,074,000 Pennetta HVAC portion that is already tracked separately via Resolution 11.10 (which has bid tab AF10659 attached).
summaries.notes: Multi-vendor split. Earlier Pennetta-only attribution was incorrect. Funded Dougherty $5.187M (71%) and Pennetta $2.074M (29%).

summaries.summary: Same Dougherty $5,187,000 item as idx 2, re-voted at March 19, 2024 special budget meeting. Dedup-removed in deduplicated views.

Rescission of the Institute for Multi-Sensory Education renewal for (PD23-24-CC14-75) Orton Gillingham K-2 Certified Training — district decided not to renew the contract previously approved in Resolution 8.17 on March 27, 2024. This is a removal of a prior obligation, not new spending.
summaries.excluded_reason: Rescission reverses prior obligation, not new spending

Amendment to Resolution 10.16 from June 27, 2024 (PD24-25-47, Summer Extended Year Special Education Transportation) — adds 3 omitted routes: S816 (JR Transport, $14,280), S822 ($13,480), S823 ($37,260). The dollar amount captured ($1,845,670) is the cumulative total of the parent resolution being re-cited, NOT new spending. Parent Resolution 10.16 from 6/27/24 IS in the dataset and HAS a file attached. Actual incremental undocumented spending from this amendment is only ~$65K for the 3 added routes.
